---
name: Question
about: Ask about the intent, scope, or expected behavior of a specification
title: "[Question] "
labels: ["question"]
---

## Specification and section (if applicable)

Which spec (OPI-EPS, OPI-PD, OPI-TRUST) and which section is this about? If the question is cross-cutting or about the initiative as a whole, say so.

## What are you trying to do?

Describe the use case or scenario that prompted the question.

## What is unclear?

What did you expect the specification to tell you that it does not?

## What have you already considered?

(Optional.) Any interpretations you tried, and any relevant issues or external documents you have already read.
